arts.ttl: 10-G/A this season: Man United to battle Chelsea, Arsenal for £42m-rated wide player
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing the Inter Milan defender Denzel Dumfries at the end of the season. The Inter Milan defender has established himself as one of the finest in the Italian league and he has eight goals and two assists to his name this season. arts.ttl: Arsenal unexpected injury boost emerges hours before Man Utd match as Mikel Arteta squad spotted
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli appears to have travelled with the Arsenal squad for their match against Manchester United . Footage posted on Saturday night is said to show the Arsenal squad arriving at Manchester Piccadilly train station that same evening.

Sancho joined Chelsea from Man Utd in an 11th-hour Deadline Day loan deal last summer. Man Utd are now laughing all the way to the bank having managed to guarantee a sale for as much as €30 million this summer.

arts.ttl: Source: Arsenal close to appointing Berta as SD
arts.sum: Arsenal are close to appointing Andrea Berta as their new sporting director, a source has told ESPN.

arts.ttl: West Ham lead Man United and Tottenham in the race to sign 24-year-old English star
arts.sum: Premier League clubs West Ham, Manchester United and Tottenham are all looking for a new midfielder in the summer transfer window. A player that is catching the eye of most Premier League clubs is Lille midfielder Angel Gomes who is set to become a free agent at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Arsenal receive huge injury boost before Man United as 23-year-old 'makes unexpected return' to matchday squad
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly receive a huge and unexpected injury boost before their Premier League showdown with Manchester United, as Gabriel Martinelli is part of the squad.

arts.ttl: Asking price revealed: Arsenal keen on signing Liverpool’s Mo Salah replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are keen on signing Kingsley Coman from Bayern Munich at the end of the season. According to a report from Fichajes, Arsenal and Liverpool are the main candidates to sign the 28-year-old French international who is expected to be on the move this summer. arts.ttl: Confirmed Manchester United squad members vs Arsenal as youngster could make full debut
arts.sum: Man United's squad members started to arrive at Old Trafford shortly after 12.30pm for their Premier League clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Berta agrees to be Arsenal sporting director
arts.sum: Andrea Berta has chosen to become the new sporting director of Arsenal amid interest from Manchester United, Paris Saint-Germain and other top clubs - but the chance to work at Arsenal and in the Premier League proved too good an opportunity to turn down.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'face competition' for Ferran Torres as La Liga club 'prepares £17m bid'
arts.sum: Villarreal are allegedly determined to sign Barcelona attacker Ferran Torres during this summer's transfer window, with an offer of £17m potentially being made.
